windows.command: bun install --save-dev husky @commitlint/config-conventional @commitlint/cli; bunx husky init; Remove-Item -Path .husky/pre-commit -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Set-Content -Path .husky/commit-msg -Value 'bunx --no -- commitlint --edit $1'; Set-Content -Path .husky/pre-push -Value 'bun run test:int && bun run build'; @{extends = @('@commitlint/config-conventional')} | ConvertTo-Json | Set-Content -Path .commitlintrc.json

linux.command: bun install --save-dev husky @commitlint/config-conventional @commitlint/cli && bunx husky init && rm -f .husky/pre-commit && echo 'bunx --no -- commitlint --edit $1' > .husky/commit-msg && echo 'bun run test:int && bun run build' > .husky/pre-push && echo '{"extends": ["@commitlint/config-conventional"]}' > .commitlintrc.json

osx.command: bun install --save-dev husky @commitlint/config-conventional @commitlint/cli && bunx husky init && rm -f .husky/pre-commit && echo 'bunx --no -- commitlint --edit $1' > .husky/commit-msg && echo 'bun run test:int && bun run build' > .husky/pre-push && echo '{"extends": ["@commitlint/config-conventional"]}' > .commitlintrc.json

windows.command: bun install --save-dev semantic-release @semantic-release/changelog @semantic-release/git @semantic-release/github; bun -e "const fs = require('fs'); const p = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json', 'utf8')); p.scripts.release = 'semantic-release'; fs.writeFileSync('package.json', JSON.stringify(p, null, 2) + '\n', 'utf8'); fs.writeFileSync('.releaserc.json', JSON.stringify({ branches: ['main'], plugins: ['@semantic-release/commit-analyzer', '@semantic-release/release-notes-generator', '@semantic-release/changelog', '@semantic-release/github', ['@semantic-release/git', { assets: ['package.json', 'CHANGELOG.md'], message: 'chore(release): ' + '$' + '{nextRelease.version} [skip ci]' }]] }, null, 2) + '\n', 'utf8');"

linux.command: bun install --save-dev semantic-release @semantic-release/changelog @semantic-release/git @semantic-release/github && bun -e "const fs = require('fs'); const p = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json', 'utf8')); p.scripts.release = 'semantic-release'; fs.writeFileSync('package.json', JSON.stringify(p, null, 2) + '\n', 'utf8'); fs.writeFileSync('.releaserc.json', JSON.stringify({ branches: ['main'], plugins: ['@semantic-release/commit-analyzer', '@semantic-release/release-notes-generator', '@semantic-release/changelog', '@semantic-release/github', ['@semantic-release/git', { assets: ['package.json', 'CHANGELOG.md'], message: 'chore(release): ' + '$' + '{nextRelease.version} [skip ci]' }]] }, null, 2) + '\n', 'utf8');"

osx.command: bun install --save-dev semantic-release @semantic-release/changelog @semantic-release/git @semantic-release/github && bun -e "const fs = require('fs'); const p = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json', 'utf8')); p.scripts.release = 'semantic-release'; fs.writeFileSync('package.json', JSON.stringify(p, null, 2) + '\n', 'utf8'); fs.writeFileSync('.releaserc.json', JSON.stringify({ branches: ['main'], plugins: ['@semantic-release/commit-analyzer', '@semantic-release/release-notes-generator', '@semantic-release/changelog', '@semantic-release/github', ['@semantic-release/git', { assets: ['package.json', 'CHANGELOG.md'], message: 'chore(release): ' + '$' + '{nextRelease.version} [skip ci]' }]] }, null, 2) + '\n', 'utf8');"
